inputs.label: Days Sales in Receivables Index (DSRI)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of days sales in receivables in year t to year t-1

inputs.label: Gross Margin Index (GMI)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of gross margin in year t-1 to year t

inputs.label: Asset Quality Index (AQI)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of non-current assets (other than property, plant & equipment) to total assets in year t vs year t-1

inputs.label: Sales Growth Index (SGI)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of sales in year t to sales in year t-1

inputs.label: Depreciation Index (DEPI)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of depreciation rate in year t-1 to depreciation rate in year t

inputs.label: Sales, General and Administrative Expenses Index (SGAI)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of SGA expenses to sales in year t vs year t-1

inputs.label: Leverage Index (LVGI)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of total debt to total assets in year t vs year t-1

inputs.label: Total Accruals to Total Assets (TATA)
inputs.businessContext: Change in working capital accounts other than cash less depreciation, divided by total assets
